You are an OCI Terraform specialist. Provide technical guidance on Terraform resources for Load Balancer, backend sets, and listeners.
Descreva o processo de resolver Load Balancer problems para MediaStream Pro (multi-region-expansion) em analytics/ap-sydney-1

implementação via OCI CLI para load-balancer - MediaStream Pro - multi-region-expansion:

**criação do recurso:**
```bash
oci lb load-balancer create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='analytics'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "load-balancer-analytics-008" \
  --region ap-sydney-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci lb load-balancer list \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='ACTIVE'].{name:"display-name",shape:"shape-name"}"
```

**Atualizar configuração:**
```bash
oci lb load-balancer update \
  --load-balancer-id <resource-ocid> \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "MediaStream Pro - multi-region-expansion"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "analytics", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**monitoramento:**
```bash
oci lb load-balancer get \
  --load-balancer-id <resource-ocid> \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci lb load-balancer delete \
  --load-balancer-id <resource-ocid> \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `analytics`
- Region: `ap-sydney-1`
- Shape: `VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex`
- OCPUs: `1`
- Storage: `200 GB`

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in WAF. Provide technical guidance on Web Application Firewall, access rules, and rate limiting.
A equipe da EduPlatform Global quer monitorar WAF para performance-tuning. Qual configuração no compartment security?

**Monitoring & Alerting — Waf (EduPlatform Global - performance-tuning)**

**métricas essenciais:**
| métrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**configuração de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id security \
  --display-name "high-cpu-security" \
  --metric-compartment-id security \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (análise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

Quais etapas para configurar Load Balancer para HTTP/2 da TechCorp Brasil (projeto ecommerce-migration, compartment production)?

**Performance Tuning — Load Balancer (TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration)**

**Metodologia de benchmark:**
1. Establish baseline com métricas atuais
2. Identificar bottleneck (CPU, memory, I/O, network)
3. Aplicar otimização isolada
4. Re-medir e comparar
5. Documentar resultados

**Ferramentas OCI:**
- OCI Monitoring: métricas em tempo real
- OCI APM: application performance monitoring
- OCI Logging: logs estruturados para análise
- Service Connector Hub: pipeline de observabilidade

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id <ocid>
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

Como implementar NSG para database tier com configurar para a GameForge Studios no projeto zero-trust-implementation (sandbox, eu-frankfurt-1)?

**Monitoring & Alerting — Security (GameForge Studios - zero-trust-implementation)**

**métricas essenciais:**
| métrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**configuração de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id sandbox \
  --display-name "high-cpu-sandbox" \
  --metric-compartment-id sandbox \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (análise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

A TechCorp Brasil esta no projeto ecommerce-migration e precisa diagnosticar CORS configuration errors. Como proceder no production (sa-saopaulo-1)?

implementação via OCI CLI para storage - TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration:

**criação do recurso:**
```bash
oci bv volume create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='production'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "storage-production-080" \
  --region sa-saopaulo-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci bv volume list \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='AVAILABLE'].{name:"display-name",size:"size-in-gbs"}"
```

**Atualizar configuração:**
```bash
oci bv volume update \
  --volume-id <resource-ocid> \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "production", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**monitoramento:**
```bash
oci bv volume get \
  --volume-id <resource-ocid> \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci bv volume delete \
  --volume-id <resource-ocid> \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `production`
- Region: `sa-saopaulo-1`
- Shape: `VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex`
- OCPUs: `1`
- Storage: `200 GB`

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Azure to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Azure VMs to OCI Compute migration.
Qual a melhor abordagem para migrar Availability Sets para fault domains no contexto da AutoDrive Systems projeto container-platform?

**Migration Guide — Azure → OCI (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (Azure → OCI):**
| Azure | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migração:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs Azure

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicações (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em métricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migração OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: migração direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: automação de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Descreva o processo de diagnosticar backup failure problems para CloudNative Inc (microservices-refactor) em staging/us-phoenix-1

**Performance Tuning — Database (CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor)**

**Metodologia de benchmark:**
1. Establish baseline com métricas atuais
2. Identificar bottleneck (CPU, memory, I/O, network)
3. Aplicar otimização isolada
4. Re-medir e comparar
5. Documentar resultados

**Ferramentas OCI:**
- OCI Monitoring: métricas em tempo real
- OCI APM: application performance monitoring
- OCI Logging: logs estruturados para análise
- Service Connector Hub: pipeline de observabilidade

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id <ocid>
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

Quais etapas para diagnosticar database upgrade problems da MediaStream Pro (projeto multi-region-expansion, compartment analytics)?

implementação via OCI CLI para database - MediaStream Pro - multi-region-expansion:

**criação do recurso:**
```bash
oci db autonomous-database create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='analytics'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "database-analytics-068" \
  --region ap-sydney-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci db autonomous-database list \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='AVAILABLE'].{name:"display-name",db:"db-name"}"
```

**Atualizar configuração:**
```bash
oci db autonomous-database update \
  --autonomous-database-id <resource-ocid> \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "MediaStream Pro - multi-region-expansion"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "analytics", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**monitoramento:**
```bash
oci db autonomous-database get \
  --autonomous-database-id <resource-ocid> \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci db autonomous-database delete \
  --autonomous-database-id <resource-ocid> \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `analytics`
- Region: `ap-sydney-1`
- Shape: `VM.Standard3.Flex`
- OCPUs: `16`
- Storage: `200 GB`

You are an OCI troubleshooting specialist with expertise in database. Provide diagnostic guidance on connection issues and TNS errors.
Orientacoes para diagnosticar backup failure problems no cenario da AutoDrive Systems - projeto container-platform, ap-mumbai-1, networking

**Disaster Recovery — Database (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicação
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperação
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicação de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in OKE. Provide technical guidance on cluster creation, node pools, and Kubernetes deployments.
Como implementar persistent volume claims com diagnosticar para a GameForge Studios no projeto zero-trust-implementation (sandbox, eu-frankfurt-1)?

**Monitoring & Alerting — Oke (GameForge Studios - zero-trust-implementation)**

**métricas essenciais:**
| métrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**configuração de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id sandbox \
  --display-name "high-cpu-sandbox" \
  --metric-compartment-id sandbox \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (análise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

**otimizações recomendadas:**
- Autonomous Database: ECPUs sao mais eficientes para workloads variáveis
- Use Always Free Autonomous Database para dev/test
- Pause Autonomous Database quando nao em uso
- MySQL HeatWave: inclua analytics sem ETL separado

**Referencia:** [OCI Database Pricing](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/database/pricing/)

**Dicas de otimização:**
- Monitore utilizacao real antes de dimensionar
- Automatize start/stop de ambientes non-production
- Use OCI Cost Analysis reports mensalmente
- Avalie serverless (Functions, Autonomous) para workloads variáveis

A equipe da BioResearch Labs quer otimizar performance de MySQL para api-gateway-deployment. Qual configuração no compartment shared-services?

**Performance Tuning — Database (BioResearch Labs - api-gateway-deployment)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Auto scaling: 1-20x OCPUs baseado em carga
- Auto indexing: Oracle cria/drop índices automaticamente
- SQL Performance Analyzer: testa queries antes de deploy
- AWR reports: identifica bottlenecks

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- HeatWave cluster: in-memory analytics 400x mais rapido
- Auto parallel load: otimiza dados para HeatWave
- Query rewrite: otimiza queries automaticamente

**PostgreSQL:**
- Connection pooling: PgBouncer para >500 conexões
- Autovacuum tuning: baseado em write workload
- Shared buffers: 25% da RAM disponível

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id <ocid>
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in MySQL HeatWave. Provide technical guidance on MySQL configuration, scaling, and replication.
Quais etapas para criar MySQL HeatWave da RetailMax Online (projeto compliance-audit, compartment shared-services)?

**Disaster Recovery — Database (RetailMax Online - compliance-audit)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Autonomous Data Guard: standby cross-region automatico
- RPO: 0 (sync replication), RTO: minutos
- Failover manual ou automatico via OCI
- Backup automatico: retém 60 dias

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- Point-in-time recovery: ate 5 minutos
- Cross-region read replica para DR
- Automated backups: retém 35 dias

**Recovery procedure:**
1. Verificar status do primary database
2. Promover standby para primary (Data Guard)
3. Atualizar connection strings na aplicacao
4. Validar integridade dos dados
5. Recriar standby na regiao original

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Compute instances. Provide technical guidance on instance creation, shape selection, SSH access, and lifecycle management.
Quais etapas para configurar preemptible instances da SmartCity IoT (projeto backup-strategy, compartment staging)?

**Performance Tuning — Compute (SmartCity IoT - backup-strategy)**

**métricas criticas:**
| métrica | Threshold | Acao |
|---------|-----------|------|
| CPU Utilization | >80% sustained | Scale up ou adicionar instancias |
| Memory | >85% | Verificar memory leaks, scale up |
| Network throughput | >70% da capacity | Considerar shape com mais bandwidth |
| Disk IOPS | >80% provisionadas | Aumentar performance tier do Block Volume |

**otimizações de shape:**
- BM.Standard.E5: 16 OCPUs — ideal para workloads balanced
- Flexible shapes: ajuste OCPUs e memory independentemente
- Dense I/O: para workloads com alto IOPS local
- GPU: para ML inference e rendering

**Tuning de sistema operacional:**
- Kernel parameters: net.core.somaxconn, fs.file-max
- TCP: enable TCP BBR congestion control
- Storage: use paravirtualized attachment para latencia menor
- Oracle Cloud Agent: habilitar todos os plugins

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id <ocid>
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Compute instances. Provide technical guidance on instance creation, shape selection, SSH access, and lifecycle management.
Como planejar e executar configurar SSH access para HealthTech Systems no projeto cost-optimization (ap-mumbai-1)?

**Disaster Recovery — Compute (HealthTech Systems - cost-optimization)**

**Estrategia de DR:**
| RPO | RTO | Estrategia | Custo |
|-----|-----|------------|-------|
| 24h | Horas | Backup + Restore | Baixo |
| 1h | Minutos | Cross-region replication | Medio |
| 0 | Segundos | Active-Active multi-region | Alto |

**Plano de recuperação:**
1. **Backup**: Custom images + boot volume backups em regiao secundaria
2. **replicação**: Cross-region copy de custom images
3. **Failover**: Instance pool em regiao secundaria com auto-scaling
4. **DNS**: Steering policy para redirecionar trafego

**Comandos de recuperação:**
```bash
# Criar backup do boot volume
oci compute boot-volume backup create \
  --boot-volume-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "dr-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d)" \
  --compartment-id networking

# Cross-region copy
oci compute boot-volume-backup copy \
  --boot-volume-backup-id <ocid> \
```

Quais etapas para usar console connection da BioResearch Labs (projeto api-gateway-deployment, compartment shared-services)?

**Performance Tuning — Compute (BioResearch Labs - api-gateway-deployment)**

**métricas criticas:**
| métrica | Threshold | Acao |
|---------|-----------|------|
| CPU Utilization | >80% sustained | Scale up ou adicionar instancias |
| Memory | >85% | Verificar memory leaks, scale up |
| Network throughput | >70% da capacity | Considerar shape com mais bandwidth |
| Disk IOPS | >80% provisionadas | Aumentar performance tier do Block Volume |

**otimizações de shape:**
- VM.Standard.E4.Flex: 48 OCPUs — ideal para workloads balanced
- Flexible shapes: ajuste OCPUs e memory independentemente
- Dense I/O: para workloads com alto IOPS local
- GPU: para ML inference e rendering

**Tuning de sistema operacional:**
- Kernel parameters: net.core.somaxconn, fs.file-max
- TCP: enable TCP BBR congestion control
- Storage: use paravirtualized attachment para latencia menor
- Oracle Cloud Agent: habilitar todos os plugins

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id <ocid>
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

Como planejar e executar dimensionar capacidade para InsureTech Plus no projeto identity-federation (me-jeddah-1)?

**Monitoring & Alerting — Scaling (InsureTech Plus - identity-federation)**

**métricas essenciais:**
| métrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**configuração de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id devops \
  --display-name "high-cpu-devops" \
  --metric-compartment-id devops \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (análise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)


**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (análise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

documentação: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Concepts/computeoverview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Compute scaling. Provide technical guidance on instance pools, auto-scaling, and capacity planning.
A equipe da EduPlatform Global quer resolver scaling problems para performance-tuning. Qual configuração no compartment security?

**Monitoring & Alerting — Scaling (EduPlatform Global - performance-tuning)**

**métricas essenciais:**
| métrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**configuração de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id security \
  --display-name "high-cpu-security" \
  --metric-compartment-id security \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (análise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

A CloudNative Inc precisa migrar GCP Filestore para File Storage para o projeto microservices-refactor. Como fazer no compartment staging?

implementação via OCI CLI para gcp-storage - CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor:

**criação do recurso:**
```bash
oci os bucket create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='staging'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "gcp-storage-staging-002" \
  --region us-phoenix-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci os bucket list \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='ACTIVE'].{name:"name",tier:"storage-tier"}"
```

**Atualizar configuração:**
```bash
oci os bucket update \
  --bucket-name <resource-ocid> \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "staging", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**monitoramento:**
```bash
oci os bucket get \
  --bucket-name <resource-ocid> \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci os bucket delete \
  --bucket-name <resource-ocid> \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `staging`
- Region: `us-phoenix-1`
- Shape: `VM.Optimized3.Flex`
- OCPUs: `4`
- Storage: `200 GB`

**análise de Custos — Storage (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**Componentes de custo:**

3. **Data transfer**: Cross-region replication tem custo adicional
4. **Lifecycle policies**: Archive tier para dados raramente acessados

**otimizações recomendadas:**
- Use Object Storage Standard para dados frequentemente acessados
- Mova para Archive/Infrequent Access apos 30 dias
- Delete unattached Block Volumes (cobranca continua)
- Compacte backups de Block Volume

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Object Storage. Provide technical guidance on buckets, pre-authenticated requests, lifecycle policies, and versioning.
Quais etapas para configurar retention policy da MediaStream Pro (projeto multi-region-expansion, compartment analytics)?

**Disaster Recovery — Storage (MediaStream Pro - multi-region-expansion)**

**Block Volume:**
- Volume groups para backup consistente
- Cross-region volume group backup
- Clone de backups para recovery testing

**Object Storage:**
- Cross-region replication (automatica)
- Versioning para proteção contra delecao acidental
- Object lifecycle policies para gerenciamento de versões

**File Storage:**
- File system snapshots
- replicação manual via rsync para regiao secundaria
- Mount targets em multiplas ADs para HA

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Quais etapas para configurar log disaster recovery da EnergyGrid Monitor (projeto serverless-transformation, compartment security)?

**Integration Pattern — Observability (EnergyGrid Monitor - serverless-transformation)**

**Arquitetura de Observabilidade:**
```
Applications → OCI Logging ──┐
                             ↓
Infrastructure → OCI Monitoring → Service Connector Hub
                             ↓
User Experience → OCI APM ───┘
            ↓
    OCI Notifications
            ↓
    PagerDuty / Slack / Email
```

**Service Connector Hub flows:**
- Logs → Object Storage (compliance archive)
- Logs → Functions (real-time processing)
- Metrics → Notifications (alerting)
- Audit → Streaming (security analysis)

**Dynamic Groups para integração:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'security'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'security'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group security-functions to manage objects in compartment security
Allow dynamic-group security-functions to use secret-family in compartment security
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Logging. Provide technical guidance on log groups, custom logs, and audit logs.
A equipe da CloudNative Inc quer configurar log alerting para microservices-refactor. Qual configuração no compartment staging?

**Monitoring & Alerting — Logging (CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor)**

**métricas essenciais:**
| métrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**configuração de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id staging \
  --display-name "high-cpu-staging" \
  --metric-compartment-id staging \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (análise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in File Storage. Provide technical guidance on NFS, mount targets, export options, and backup strategies.
Como implementar segurança de File Storage com configurar para a LogiTrack Logistics no projeto security-hardening (data-platform, ca-toronto-1)?

**Performance Tuning — Storage (LogiTrack Logistics - security-hardening)**

**Block Volume Performance Tiers:**
| Tier | IOPS/GB | Throughput/GB | Use Case |
|------|---------|---------------|----------|
| Balanced | 10 | 480KB/s | General purpose |
| Higher Performance | 20 | 960KB/s | Databases |
| Ultra High Performance | 75 | 3.6MB/s | High-throughput workloads |

**otimizações:**
- Stripe multiplos Block Volumes para IOPS agregados
- Use NVMe local em Dense I/O shapes para maximo throughput
- Object Storage: multipart upload para arquivos >100MB
- File Storage: ajuste throughput mode (elastic vs provisioned)
- Enable paravirtualized attachment para menor latencia

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id <ocid>
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in AWS to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on RDS to OCI Database migration.
A SmartCity IoT esta no projeto backup-strategy e precisa configurar monitoring RDS-OCI. Como proceder no staging (us-phoenix-1)?

**Disaster Recovery — Aws Database (SmartCity IoT - backup-strategy)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicação
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperação
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicação de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

A SmartCity IoT esta no projeto backup-strategy e precisa monitorar stacks Resource Manager. Como proceder no staging (us-phoenix-1)?

**Integration Pattern — DevOps (SmartCity IoT - backup-strategy)**

**CI/CD Pipeline:**
```
Git Repo → OCI DevOps Build → OCIR → OKE / Compute
                ↓
        OCI DevOps Deploy
                ↓
        OCI Functions / Compute Instance Group
                ↓
        OCI Monitoring (health check)
```

**Infrastructure as Code:**
- Terraform via OCI Resource Manager
- State management em Object Storage
- Plans automaticos em MRs
- Apply via pipeline aprovado

**Dynamic Groups para integração:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'staging'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'staging'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group staging-functions to manage objects in compartment staging
Allow dynamic-group staging-functions to use secret-family in compartment staging
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in on-premises to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on lift-and-shift and cutover planning.
A SecureBank Corp esta no projeto ci-cd-pipeline e precisa migrar physical servers. Como proceder no production (sa-saopaulo-1)?

**Migration Guide — On-premises → OCI (SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (On-premises → OCI):**
| On-premises | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migração:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs On-premises

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicações (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em métricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migração OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: migração direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: automação de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Como configurar data transformation com foco em configurar para AgriTech Innovations no projeto hybrid-cloud-integration?

**Disaster Recovery — Data Transfer (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicação
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperação
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicação de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Exadata Cloud Service. Provide technical guidance on infrastructure, DB systems, and patching.
Quais etapas para criar Exadata Cloud Service da RetailMax Online (projeto compliance-audit, compartment shared-services)?

**Disaster Recovery — Database (RetailMax Online - compliance-audit)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Autonomous Data Guard: standby cross-region automatico
- RPO: 0 (sync replication), RTO: minutos
- Failover manual ou automatico via OCI
- Backup automatico: retém 60 dias

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- Point-in-time recovery: ate 5 minutos
- Cross-region read replica para DR
- Automated backups: retém 35 dias

**Recovery procedure:**
1. Verificar status do primary database
2. Promover standby para primary (Data Guard)
3. Atualizar connection strings na aplicacao
4. Validar integridade dos dados
5. Recriar standby na regiao original

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos


**Performance Tuning — Autonomous Json (EnergyGrid Monitor - serverless-transformation)**

**Metodologia de benchmark:**
1. Establish baseline com métricas atuais
2. Identificar bottleneck (CPU, memory, I/O, network)
3. Aplicar otimização isolada
4. Re-medir e comparar
5. Documentar resultados

**Ferramentas OCI:**
- OCI Monitoring: métricas em tempo real
- OCI APM: application performance monitoring
- OCI Logging: logs estruturados para análise
- Service Connector Hub: pipeline de observabilidade

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id <ocid>
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

Como migrar Azure File para File Storage para BioResearch Labs (api-gateway-deployment) no compartment shared-services (uk-london-1)?

**Disaster Recovery — Azure Storage (BioResearch Labs - api-gateway-deployment)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicação
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperação
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicação de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in Cloud Guard. Provide technical guidance on detector recipes and responder rules.
Melhores práticas para monitorar security score no contexto TravelHub Platform/monitoring-overhaul (development, us-ashburn-1)

**Monitoring & Alerting — Cloud Guard (TravelHub Platform - monitoring-overhaul)**

**métricas essenciais:**
| métrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**configuração de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id development \
  --display-name "high-cpu-development" \
  --metric-compartment-id development \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (análise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (análise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

Quais etapas para diagnosticar function security problems da EduPlatform Global (projeto performance-tuning, compartment security)?

**Integration Pattern — Serverless (EduPlatform Global - performance-tuning)**

**Arquitetura:**
```
Internet → API Gateway → OCI Functions → OCI Services
                                    ↓
                    ┌───────────────┼───────────────┐
                    ↓               ↓               ↓
              Object Storage   Autonomous DB   OCI Vault
```

**Fluxo de dados:**
1. Client faz request via API Gateway
2. API Gateway autentica e roteia para Function
3. Function processa, acessa servicos OCI via SDK
4. Response retornada ao client

**Exemplo de integração:**
```python
import oci
from fdk import response

def handler(ctx, data: dict = None):
    object_storage = oci.object_storage.ObjectStorageClient(
        oci.config.from_file()
    )
    namespace = object_storage.get_namespace().data
    object_storage.put_object(
        namespace_name=namespace,
        bucket_name="results",
        object_name="output.json",
        put_object_body=oci.útil.to_stream(data)
    )
    return response.Response(
        ctx, response_data={"status": "success"},
        headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    )
```

**Dynamic Groups para integração:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'security'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'security'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group security-functions to manage objects in compartment security
Allow dynamic-group security-functions to use secret-family in compartment security
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

Passo a passo para diagnosticar database authentication failures da FoodChain Trace (projeto database-consolidation, ca-toronto-1, data-platform)

**Disaster Recovery — Database (FoodChain Trace - database-consolidation)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicação
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperação
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicação de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Azure to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Azure SQL to Autonomous Database migration.
Quais etapas para otimizar custos pos-migração Azure DB da SmartCity IoT (projeto backup-strategy, compartment staging)?

**Migration Guide — Azure → OCI (SmartCity IoT - backup-strategy)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (Azure → OCI):**
| Azure | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migração:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs Azure

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicações (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em métricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migração OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: migração direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: automação de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

**Disaster Recovery — Azure Database (MediaStream Pro - multi-region-expansion)**

1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicação
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperação
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicação de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI troubleshooting specialist with expertise in OKE. Provide diagnostic guidance on cluster, node pool, and worker node issues.
Como implementar network policy conflicts com diagnosticar para a LogiTrack Logistics no projeto security-hardening (data-platform, ca-toronto-1)?

**Monitoring & Alerting — Oke (LogiTrack Logistics - security-hardening)**

**métricas essenciais:**
| métrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**configuração de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id data-platform \
  --display-name "high-cpu-data-platform" \
  --metric-compartment-id data-platform \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (análise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

You are an OCI troubleshooting specialist with expertise in performance. Provide diagnostic guidance on CPU, memory, storage, and network performance.
Passo a passo para diagnosticar container resource limits da InsureTech Plus (projeto identity-federation, me-jeddah-1, devops)

**Monitoring & Alerting — Performance (InsureTech Plus - identity-federation)**

**métricas essenciais:**
| métrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**configuração de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id devops \
  --display-name "high-cpu-devops" \
  --metric-compartment-id devops \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (análise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in Vault secrets. Provide technical guidance on secret creation, retrieval, and rotation.
Passo a passo para configurar access control de secrets da FoodChain Trace (projeto database-consolidation, ca-toronto-1, data-platform)

**Disaster Recovery — Vault Secrets (FoodChain Trace - database-consolidation)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicação
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperação
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicação de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in AWS to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on S3 to Object Storage migration.
Como implementar S3 access policies com migrar para a HealthTech Systems no projeto cost-optimization (networking, ap-mumbai-1)?

**Migration Guide — AWS → OCI (HealthTech Systems - cost-optimization)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (AWS → OCI):**
| AWS | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migração:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs AWS

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicações (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em métricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migração OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: migração direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: automação de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

documentação: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in AWS to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on S3 to Object Storage migration.
Como implementar S3 encryption com migrar para a InsureTech Plus no projeto identity-federation (devops, me-jeddah-1)?

**Disaster Recovery — Aws Storage (InsureTech Plus - identity-federation)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicação
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperação
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicação de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Autonomous Database. Provide technical guidance on ATP, ADW, wallet management, and connection strings.
A equipe da TechCorp Brasil quer migrar database para Autonomous Database para ecommerce-migration. Qual configuração no compartment production?

**Performance Tuning — Database (TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Auto scaling: 1-20x OCPUs baseado em carga
- Auto indexing: Oracle cria/drop índices automaticamente
- SQL Performance Analyzer: testa queries antes de deploy
- AWR reports: identifica bottlenecks

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- HeatWave cluster: in-memory analytics 400x mais rapido
- Auto parallel load: otimiza dados para HeatWave
- Query rewrite: otimiza queries automaticamente

**PostgreSQL:**
- Connection pooling: PgBouncer para >500 conexões
- Autovacuum tuning: baseado em write workload
- Shared buffers: 25% da RAM disponível

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id <ocid>
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

documentação: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Database/Concepts/databaseoverview.htm

**Componentes de custo:**

2. **Storage**: Database storage com backup automatico
3. **Licenciamento**: Oracle Database (incluido no Autonomous)
4. **Cross-region DR**: Data Guard tem custo adicional

**otimizações recomendadas:**
- Autonomous Database: ECPUs sao mais eficientes para workloads variáveis
- Use Always Free Autonomous Database para dev/test
- Pause Autonomous Database quando nao em uso
- MySQL HeatWave: inclua analytics sem ETL separado

**Referencia:** [OCI Database Pricing](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/database/pricing/)

**Dicas de otimização:**
- Monitore utilizacao real antes de dimensionar
- Automatize start/stop de ambientes non-production
- Use OCI Cost Analysis reports mensalmente
- Avalie serverless (Functions, Autonomous) para workloads variáveis

A equipe da EnergyGrid Monitor quer gerenciar usuarios de ADB para serverless-transformation. Qual configuração no compartment security?

**Performance Tuning — Database (EnergyGrid Monitor - serverless-transformation)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Auto scaling: 1-20x OCPUs baseado em carga
- Auto indexing: Oracle cria/drop índices automaticamente
- SQL Performance Analyzer: testa queries antes de deploy
- AWR reports: identifica bottlenecks

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- HeatWave cluster: in-memory analytics 400x mais rapido
- Auto parallel load: otimiza dados para HeatWave
- Query rewrite: otimiza queries automaticamente

**PostgreSQL:**
- Connection pooling: PgBouncer para >500 conexões
- Autovacuum tuning: baseado em write workload
- Shared buffers: 25% da RAM disponível

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id <ocid>
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

Passo a passo para planejar cutover VMware-OCI da InsureTech Plus (projeto identity-federation, me-jeddah-1, devops)

**Disaster Recovery — Onprem Vmware (InsureTech Plus - identity-federation)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicação
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperação
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicação de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

implementação via OCI CLI para onprem-vmware - CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor:

```bash
oci compute instance launch \

  --region us-phoenix-1 \

```

```bash
oci compute instance update \
  --instance-id <resource-ocid> \

  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "staging", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

```bash
  --instance-id <resource-ocid> \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**

```bash
oci compute instance terminate \
  --instance-id <resource-ocid> \
  --force
```

- Compartment: `staging`
- Region: `us-phoenix-1`
- Shape: `VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex`
- OCPUs: `48`
- Storage: `200 GB`

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in VMware to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on VMware Cloud Foundation and hybrid connectivity.
A RetailMax Online esta no projeto compliance-audit e precisa migrar vROps para OCI monitoring. Como proceder no shared-services (uk-london-1)?

**Migration Guide — On-premises → OCI (RetailMax Online - compliance-audit)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (On-premises → OCI):**
| On-premises | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migração:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs On-premises

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicações (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em métricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migração OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: migração direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: automação de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Quais sao os requisitos para monitorar performance de Block Volume no ambiente da EduPlatform Global (performance-tuning)?

**análise de Custos — Storage (EduPlatform Global - performance-tuning)**

**Componentes de custo:**
1. **Provisionado vs utilizado**: Block Volume cobra pelo provisionado
2. **Tier de performance**: Higher IOPS = higher cost
3. **Data transfer**: Cross-region replication tem custo adicional
4. **Lifecycle policies**: Archive tier para dados raramente acessados

**otimizações recomendadas:**
- Use Object Storage Standard para dados frequentemente acessados
- Mova para Archive/Infrequent Access apos 30 dias
- Delete unattached Block Volumes (cobranca continua)
- Compacte backups de Block Volume

**Referencia:** [OCI Storage Pricing](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/storage/pricing/)

**Dicas de otimização:**
- Monitore utilizacao real antes de dimensionar
- Automatize start/stop de ambientes non-production
- Use OCI Cost Analysis reports mensalmente

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Block Storage. Provide technical guidance on block volume creation, attachment, performance tiers, and backup strategies.
Quais etapas para automatizar backup de Block Volume da SmartCity IoT (projeto backup-strategy, compartment staging)?

**Performance Tuning — Storage (SmartCity IoT - backup-strategy)**

**Block Volume Performance Tiers:**
| Tier | IOPS/GB | Throughput/GB | Use Case |
|------|---------|---------------|----------|
| Balanced | 10 | 480KB/s | General purpose |
| Higher Performance | 20 | 960KB/s | Databases |
| Ultra High Performance | 75 | 3.6MB/s | High-throughput workloads |

**otimizações:**
- Stripe multiplos Block Volumes para IOPS agregados
- Use NVMe local em Dense I/O shapes para maximo throughput
- Object Storage: multipart upload para arquivos >100MB
- File Storage: ajuste throughput mode (elastic vs provisioned)
- Enable paravirtualized attachment para menor latencia

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id <ocid>
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

Como planejar e executar criar Block Volume para TravelHub Platform no projeto monitoring-overhaul (us-ashburn-1)?

**Disaster Recovery — Storage (TravelHub Platform - monitoring-overhaul)**

**Block Volume:**
- Volume groups para backup consistente
- Cross-region volume group backup
- Clone de backups para recovery testing

**Object Storage:**
- Cross-region replication (automatica)
- Versioning para proteção contra delecao acidental
- Object lifecycle policies para gerenciamento de versões

**File Storage:**
- File system snapshots
- replicação manual via rsync para regiao secundaria
- Mount targets em multiplas ADs para HA

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Block Storage. Provide technical guidance on block volume creation, attachment, performance tiers, and backup strategies.
A SecureBank Corp precisa clonar Block Volume para o projeto ci-cd-pipeline. Como fazer no compartment production?

implementação via OCI CLI para block - SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline:

**criação do recurso:**
```bash
oci bv volume create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='production'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "block-production-030" \
  --region sa-saopaulo-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci bv volume list \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='AVAILABLE'].{name:"display-name",size:"size-in-gbs"}"
```

**Atualizar configuração:**
```bash
oci bv volume update \
  --volume-id <resource-ocid> \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "production", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**monitoramento:**
```bash
oci bv volume get \
  --volume-id <resource-ocid> \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci bv volume delete \
  --volume-id <resource-ocid> \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `production`
- Region: `sa-saopaulo-1`
- Shape: ``
- OCPUs: `48`
- Storage: `50 GB`

Como implementar replication de PostgreSQL com configurar para a DataFlow Solutions no projeto data-lake-modernization (development, us-ashburn-1)?

**Disaster Recovery — Database (DataFlow Solutions - data-lake-modernization)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Autonomous Data Guard: standby cross-region automatico
- RPO: 0 (sync replication), RTO: minutos
- Failover manual ou automatico via OCI
- Backup automatico: retém 60 dias

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- Point-in-time recovery: ate 5 minutos
- Cross-region read replica para DR
- Automated backups: retém 35 dias

**Recovery procedure:**
1. Verificar status do primary database
2. Promover standby para primary (Data Guard)
3. Atualizar connection strings na aplicacao
4. Validar integridade dos dados
5. Recriar standby na regiao original

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicação e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria

**métricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado

- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Monitoring. Provide technical guidance on metrics, alarms, and notifications.
Quais etapas para criar alarms OCI Monitoring da LegalDoc Manager (projeto network-segmentation, compartment analytics)?

**Integration Pattern — Observability (LegalDoc Manager - network-segmentation)**

**Arquitetura de Observabilidade:**
```
Applications → OCI Logging ──┐
                             ↓
Infrastructure → OCI Monitoring → Service Connector Hub
                             ↓
User Experience → OCI APM ───┘
            ↓
    OCI Notifications
            ↓
    PagerDuty / Slack / Email
```

**Service Connector Hub flows:**
- Logs → Object Storage (compliance archive)
- Logs → Functions (real-time processing)
- Metrics → Notifications (alerting)
- Audit → Streaming (security analysis)

**Dynamic Groups para integração:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'analytics'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'analytics'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group analytics-functions to manage objects in compartment analytics
Allow dynamic-group analytics-functions to use secret-family in compartment analytics
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

**Monitoring & Alerting — Monitoring (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**métricas essenciais:**
| métrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**configuração de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id networking \
  --display-name "high-cpu-networking" \
  --metric-compartment-id networking \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (análise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

documentação: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Monitoring/overview.htm

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Monitoring. Provide technical guidance on metrics, alarms, and notifications.
Como configurar Monitoring reports com foco em configurar para LogiTrack Logistics no projeto security-hardening?

implementação via OCI CLI para monitoring - LogiTrack Logistics - security-hardening:

**criação do recurso:**
```bash
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='data-platform'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "monitoring-data-platform-107" \
  --region ca-toronto-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci monitoring alarm list \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query "data[?"is-enabled"=='true'].{name:"display-name",metric:"metric-compartment-id"}"
```

**Atualizar configuração:**
```bash
oci monitoring alarm update \
  --alarm-id <resource-ocid> \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "LogiTrack Logistics - security-hardening"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "data-platform", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**monitoramento:**
```bash
oci monitoring alarm get \
  --alarm-id <resource-ocid> \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci monitoring alarm delete \
  --alarm-id <resource-ocid> \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `data-platform`
- Region: `ca-toronto-1`
- Shape: `VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex`
- OCPUs: `8`
- Storage: `2000 GB`

documentação: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Monitoring/overview.htm

Como implementar latency APM com analisar para a GameForge Studios no projeto zero-trust-implementation (sandbox, eu-frankfurt-1)?

**Performance Tuning — Apm (GameForge Studios - zero-trust-implementation)**

**Metodologia de benchmark:**
1. Establish baseline com métricas atuais
2. Identificar bottleneck (CPU, memory, I/O, network)
3. Aplicar otimização isolada
4. Re-medir e comparar
5. Documentar resultados

**Ferramentas OCI:**
- OCI Monitoring: métricas em tempo real
- OCI APM: application performance monitoring
- OCI Logging: logs estruturados para análise
- Service Connector Hub: pipeline de observabilidade

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id <ocid>
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

Como planejar e executar configurar trace collection para HealthTech Systems no projeto cost-optimization (ap-mumbai-1)?

**Integration Pattern — Observability (HealthTech Systems - cost-optimization)**

**Arquitetura de Observabilidade:**
```
Applications → OCI Logging ──┐
                             ↓
Infrastructure → OCI Monitoring → Service Connector Hub
                             ↓
User Experience → OCI APM ───┘
            ↓
    OCI Notifications
            ↓
    PagerDuty / Slack / Email
```

**Service Connector Hub flows:**
- Logs → Object Storage (compliance archive)
- Logs → Functions (real-time processing)
- Metrics → Notifications (alerting)
- Audit → Streaming (security analysis)

**Dynamic Groups para integração:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'networking'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'networking'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group networking-functions to manage objects in compartment networking
Allow dynamic-group networking-functions to use secret-family in compartment networking
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)
